name: New Network Service on Known Asset
description: Detects new network services appearing on known assets (baseline violation)
query:
// New Service Detection (NDR)
// Previously unseen service on known host
events from ndr_flow
where destination_port not in ("22", "80", "443", "53", "25", "3389")
  and (destination_ip starts_with "10." or destination_ip starts_with "192.168." or destination_ip starts_with "172.")
group by destination_ip, destination_port
having count(*) >= 3
within 300 seconds
